results.title: Lev8: Find, research, and reach the right people
results.content:
Zac Zuo
Flowtica Scribe

Flowtica Scribe

Lev8 is one of the most technically grounded agent systems I’ve seen for people and company intelligence, and it works remarkably well.

The first time I tried it, I felt it had already gone beyond any general-purpose search tool I had used for finding and matching the right people and companies.

Search is an extremely long-tail problem. Lev8 handles it with a multi-agent system that can move quickly across a huge amount of scattered information and identify the exact people or companies you are looking for.

Quite often, it opens up a part of the market you did not even know existed. [...] It also does not stop at discovery. Lev8 connects the results to the social and outreach channels you already use, so the same workflow can continue all the way to the first conversation.

If connecting with people and companies is part of your work, give Lev8 a try. It may be the most accurate and efficient tool available for this job right now!

Sandy Liu

Congrats on the launch! I searched for a pretty unusual customer profile and Lev8 understood the request better than I expected. There were a couple of results I’d remove, but the overall direction was solid.

Jody

How transparent are the results? Can users see the original sources behind each data point before using it for outreach? [...] What do you think? …

Tony Zhang
Lev8

Lev8

👋 Hey Product Hunters,

I'm Tony Zhang, co-founder of Lev8 , the fastest agent to find and reach your target people and companies across every corner of the internet and reach across multiple channels.

Here are a few searches our early users have thrown at Lev8:

“Find me VPs of Sales at fast-growing voice agent startups in the Bay Area that raised funding recently.”

“Find everyone who starred our GitHub repo, then reach out to them across multiple channels.”

“Find coffee shops in San Francisco with a 4.5+ rating and no website.”

AI has made it easier to build products. Getting the right people to notice them is still hard.

Lev8 Tallow is a premium skincare product crafted from carefully selected natural ingredients, including Beef Tallow, Jojoba Oil, Honey, Beeswax, and essential oils. This blend delivers a rich source of essential fatty acids that deeply nourish and hydrate your skin. The nutrient-dense formula supports skin barrier repair, helping to restore moisture and protect against environmental stressors. Regular use enhances skin’s texture, leaving it noticeably softer, smoother, and more resilient. Ideal for all skin types, Lev8 Tallow provides gentle yet effective care, making it an expert choice for maintaining healthy, radiant skin every day.
